---
title: "Why OERs Matter"
format: html
previous:
  href: "Intro-open vs free.qmd"
  text: "Open vs. Free"

next:
  href: "Intro-brief history.qmd"
  text: "A Brief History of OERs"
---

OERs support a global movement centred on **equity**, **inclusion**, and educational **accessibility**. They remove cost barriers for learners, empower educators to **adapt** materials to local contexts, and promote **diverse representation** in teaching materials. OERs also encourage innovative {{< meta glossary.Pedagogy >}} by enabling multimedia, interactive, and platform-independent approaches. There is a lot of movement in the Open Educational Resources arena, for a variety of reasons, including the cost of textbooks [@RN65110].

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-alt="Go to next page: Intro-brief%20history.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](Intro-brief%20history.html)

-----------------
::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
